MaxLineLength:CrashActivity.kt$"Migration completed!
Processed: ${report?.tablesProcessed?.size ?: 0} tables
Backup: ${report?.backupPath}
Please restart the app."
MaxLineLength:CrashActivity.kt$exceptionMessage = "Failed to allocate a 524288000 byte allocation with 16777216 free bytes and 245MB until OOM"
MaxLineLength:CrashActivity.kt$exceptionMessage = "Migration failed: table 'Book' already exists. Cannot create table 'Chapter' due to schema conflict."

MaxLineLength:CrashActivity.kt$exceptionMessage = "This is a very long error message that demonstrates how the crash screen handles lengthy exception messages. It should wrap properly and remain readable even with extensive text content that spans multiple lines."
